name: Pasta Fagioli II
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the diced onion and cook until it becomes transparent.
3. Stir in the minced garlic and celery, cooking until all ingredients are well combined and aromatic.
4. Pour in the can of red kidney beans and stir to combine with the vegetables.
5. Cook for a few minutes until heated through.
6. Add the cooked elbow macaroni and stir to mix everything together.
7. Continue cooking until heated through, then serve hot.
